content: Phase 3.1: Map AddItemReview / closet grid / item card components
Phase 3.2: AddItemReview wires the bbox-cropped JPEG from one-pass /analyze response
Phase 3.3: Item thumbnail renders clean_image_url when ready, falls back to original; tiny 'polishing photo…' overlay while pending
Phase 3.4: Background poll on GET /closet/{id} to swap in clean cutout once status=ready (with backoff & cleanup)
Phase 3.5: 'Repair photo' CTA on items with reconstruction_advised=true, wires to existing POST /closet/{id}/repair
Phase 3.6: Add item.repairPhoto + item.polishingPhoto + reshootSuccess/Rejected/Error keys to all 12 locales
